use_cases: Creating split-pane layouts for dashboard interfaces
Building IDE-style or code editor environments with resizable panels
Implementing collapsible sidebars with adjustable widths
Designing media editing interfaces with adjustable content areas
Creating resizable content sections in documentation viewers
ai_summary: A resizable panel layout component that enables drag-to-resize functionality for creating split-view interfaces. Built on react-resizable-panels with support for horizontal and vertical panel arrangements, border styling variants, and a drag handle with grip icon for intuitive resizing.
